title: microsorum henryi
intro: Microsorum henryi, also known as the Chinese kidneywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and improving kidney function. In herbal preparations, Microsorum henryi is often combined with other plants and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
